expectations.text: Block class overrides getCacheContexts() method AND merges with parent: Cache::mergeContexts(parent::getCacheContexts(), [...]) (NOT just inline #cache contexts -- block-level cache methods are the canonical way, and parent merge preserves block placement contexts)
expectations.evidence: No getCacheContexts() method override exists in RelatedContentBlock.php. The class only uses inline #cache contexts in the build() render array (lines 138-141: 'contexts' => ['url.path', 'user']). No Cache::mergeContexts() or parent::getCacheContexts() call found.

expectations.text: Block class overrides getCacheTags() method AND merges with parent: Cache::mergeTags(parent::getCacheTags(), [...]) (NOT just inline #cache tags -- overriding without parent merge loses tags from block configuration)
expectations.evidence: No getCacheTags() method override exists in RelatedContentBlock.php. The class uses inline #cache tags in build() (lines 132-136) and has a custom helper getCacheTagsForRelatedNodes() (line 158), but does NOT override the block-level getCacheTags() method and does NOT call parent::getCacheTags().

expectations.text: getCacheTags() or #cache tags include 'node_list' tag for list-level invalidation (when ANY node is created/updated/deleted, the list needs re-evaluation -- per-node tags alone miss new content)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php line 133: 'tags' => Cache::mergeTags(['node_list'], ...) -- 'node_list' tag is included in the inline #cache tags within the build() render array.

expectations.text: Uses Cache::PERMANENT for max-age or omits max-age entirely (NOT a hardcoded number like 3600 -- content with proper cache tags should use PERMANENT and rely on tag invalidation, not time-based expiry)
expectations.evidence: RelatedContentBlock.php line 143: 'max_age' => Cache::PERMANENT -- explicitly uses Cache::PERMANENT constant.

expectations.text: Does NOT set max-age to 0 anywhere (max-age: 0 bubbles up and kills the ENTIRE page cache via Dynamic Page Cache -- use lazy_builder instead for per-user content)
expectations.evidence: Grep for 'max.age.*0|max_age.*0' in the module directory returned no matches. No max-age of 0 is set anywhere in the module.

expectations.text: Does NOT use \Drupal::cache() or manual cache API for render caching (render arrays use #cache metadata for automatic caching, not manual cache get/set)
expectations.evidence: Grep for '\Drupal::cache()' in the module directory returned no matches. The module uses only #cache render array metadata, not manual cache API calls.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en related_content_block returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: ddev drush en related_content_block -y returned '[notice] Already installed: related_content_block' with exit code 0.

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: phpcs found 9 ERRORS and 2 WARNINGS: inline comments after statements (lines 133-135, 139-140), extra spaces after commas, and lines exceeding 80 characters. Full output: 'FOUND 9 ERRORS AND 2 WARNINGS AFFECTING 5 LINES'.
